text: Produce and publish a sub-3-minute Build Week demo
description: Public YouTube video under 3 minutes, in English or with English translation. Show the working project, the new hackathon extension, and explain how Codex and GPT-5.6 were used. Suggested arc: problem (intent disappears into issue trackers/chat) -> .bowman graph beside code -> dependency/provenance demo -> why this matters for open-source teams. Avoid third-party music/trademarks without permission.

status.comment: Felix must record voice/video and publish publicly; script and shot list can be prepared by the agent.
